text: They are not the first to walk this path of desperation.
The mountain itself remembers, and it has preserved the memory in ice and stone.
Silent sentinels, riders and their dragons now stand as monuments to a plague that time could not bury.
Kale passes between them, feeling the weight of their failed vigil.
It is a graveyard of hope, and yet their very presence confers the story is true.
The shrine is near, the remedy is real. She must believe it is not too late.
